command:
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && python3 -c "import urllib.request,json,pathlib,re,subprocess,time,datetime; TOKEN=pathlib.Path('/home/jose/.secrets/n8n_api_key').read_text().strip(); EP='https://n8n.cutegrafiks.com/mcp-server/http'; ADIR=pathlib.Path('memory/operator/audit/wave-a-mcp-verify'); ADIR.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True); TS=datetime.datetime.utcnow().strftime('%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ'); results={}; 
# Test tools/list
r=subprocess.run(['curl','-s','-w','__S__%{http_code}','--max-time','15','-X','POST',EP,'-H',f'Authorization: Bearer {TOKEN}','-H','Content-Type: application/json','-d',json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':1,'method':'tools/list','params':{}})],capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=20); raw=r.stdout; status=int(re.search(r'__S__(\d+)',raw).group(1)); body=re.sub(r'__S__.*','',raw).strip(); p=json.loads(body); tools=[t['name'] for t in p.get('result',{}).get('tools',[])]; print('tools/list HTTP',status,'tools:',tools); results['tool_list_status']=status; results['tools']=tools
" 2>&1
